race.comment: NINJASK (7) stalked the pace then quickened nicely to record a comfortable maiden win when resuming over this course and distance last start. Lightly raced three-year-old who looks set to live up to early promise this prep - will pay to follow. SOME STYLE (10) has led for the judge at his last three runs but been overwhelmed and missed the placings on each occasion, the latest over 1350m at Doomben. Goes best for Ben Thompson who is back aboard. Can offer more resistance this time. CYBER CITY (9) showed the way but was nailed close to home in a Class 3 over 1350m at Ipswich recently. Down in grade and enjoys a nice run on the speed from an inside draw. Sure to be competitive in this company. FLAXLANDS (14) came with a well-timed run to win her maiden with a bit in hand when resuming over 1200m here last start. Serious chance again down in the weights. REWRITE (3) has raced well all prep and just needs luck from a tricky draw to be in the finish again.
